nasb.text: “You shall observe the Feast of Unleavened Bread. For seven days you are to eat unleavened bread, as I commanded you, at the appointed time in the month of Abib, for in the month of Abib you came out of Egypt.

esv.text: “You shall keep the Feast of Unleavened Bread. Seven days you shall eat unleavened bread, as I commanded you, at the time appointed in the month Abib, for in the month Abib you came out from Egypt.

cnv.text: “你要守除酵節，要照著我吩咐你的，在亞筆月內所定的時期吃無酵餅七天，因為你是在亞筆月從埃及出來的。

ccb.text: “要守除酵节，照我的吩咐在亚笔月所定的时间吃七天的无酵饼，因为你是在亚笔月离开埃及的。
